title: A computer problem
description: For each question, write the correct answer. Write one word for each gap.

content.text: Yesterday evening, I was finishing my history homework when my computer suddenly stopped working. I tried turning it off and on again, but nothing changed. I was worried because the homework had to be sent (27) my teacher before midnight. Luckily, my older sister knows a lot about computers, so I asked her for help. She looked (28) the problem carefully and found that the internet connection had failed. While she was fixing it, I wrote the last paragraph (29) hand in my notebook. The computer started working again after about twenty minutes, which was much sooner (30) I had expected. I typed the final paragraph quickly and checked everything twice. I managed to send the work (31) time, and my teacher replied the next morning. I was grateful (32) her help because she had saved me from a lot of trouble.
